license: All sounds are CC0 (public domain). Sources documented per entry.
setup_note: Run 'python scripts/download_sfx.py' to download audio files. Manifest is committed to git; audio files are not.
usage_rules: Claude selects SFX by exact filename — never use filenames not in this manifest
Use sparingly: 3-8 SFX per 10-minute video is professional; 15+ is amateur
impact_heavy.wav should appear at most once per video
tension_riser.wav should appear at most twice per video
Never stack two SFX within 2 seconds of each other unless intentional

sounds.description: Sharp single whoosh — quick cuts, reveals, topic changes
sounds.when_to_use: Cut between major sections, reveal of a result, entering a new chapter

sounds.description: Soft airy whoosh — gentle scene changes, B-roll transitions
sounds.when_to_use: B-roll overlay entry, calm topic shifts, thoughtful transitions

sounds.description: Heavy cinematic swoosh with tail — dramatic reveals or emotional peaks
sounds.when_to_use: Before a breakthrough moment, major reveal, final payoff

sounds.description: Gentle ascending chime — subtle success signal, not cartoonish
sounds.when_to_use: App launches, bug fixed, goal achieved, submission accepted

sounds.description: Upward arpeggio — playful achievement, more energetic than success_chime
sounds.when_to_use: Milestone reached, feature working first time, streak maintained

sounds.description: Soft two-tone notification — subtle signal, doesn't interrupt flow
sounds.when_to_use: Minor info reveal, stat display, timestamp appearing on screen

sounds.description: Digital glitch/buzz — something going wrong technically
sounds.when_to_use: Bug discovered, build fails, error message appears, plan falls apart

sounds.description: Short tension riser — builds anticipation before a reveal
sounds.when_to_use: Before showing the final result, before a difficult moment, pre-reveal. Max 2x per video.

sounds.description: Soft thud — emphasizes a cut or text appearance without being harsh
sounds.when_to_use: Title cards appearing, stats popping, key text revealing

sounds.description: Heavy cinematic hit — high-energy emphasis, use sparingly
sounds.when_to_use: The single most important moment in the video. Max 1x per video.

sounds.description: Short keyboard typing burst — texture under silent coding B-roll
sounds.when_to_use: Silent coding B-roll, screen recording without audio, work montage

sounds.description: Coffee being poured — humanizing ambient sound for late-night work moments
sounds.when_to_use: Late night coding scenes, desk B-roll, transition to long work session
